creator: wblock@wonkity.com
text:
"Function" typo in nanobsd article (/usr/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/nanobsd/article.sgml).

Fix: Apply patch:

--- en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/nanobsd/article.sgml.orig	2010-07-12 13:17:12.000000000 -0600
+++ en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/nanobsd/article.sgml	2010-07-12 13:17:28.000000000 -0600
@@ -329,7 +329,7 @@
 	<title>Adding packages</title>
 
 	<para>Packages can be added to a <application>NanoBSD</application>
-	  image using a custom function.  The following fuction will install
+	  image using a custom function.  The following function will install
 	  all the packages located in
 	  <filename>/usr/src/tools/tools/nanobsd/packages</filename>:</para>


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: grep fuction /usr/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/nanobsd/article.sgml
